name: Tajwar Abrar Aleef, PhD
role: Building production clinical and multimodal systems that scales.
subheadline: Hello World! I work across clinical AI, multimodal generative systems, and medical imaging with a focus on turning ambitious research and product ideas into dependable real-world systems. My experience spans agentic LLM workflows for radiology reporting, multimodal video and audio generation platforms, production ML infrastructure, and a strong academic foundation built through specialized medical imaging training (MSc), PhD research, and hands-on leadership from prototyping to deployment.
availability: Open to senior roles and strategic collaboration opportunities in anything and everything to do with AI.
expertise: Production ML and MLOps (AWS, GCP, Kubernetes)
